name: notebooklm-mcp
description: Connect Claude to Google NotebookLM (Enterprise + Personal). Create podcasts, research topics, generate quizzes, flashcards, mind maps, and more from your notebooks.
long_description:
This extension connects Claude Desktop to Google NotebookLM via the Model Context Protocol. It provides tools for managing notebooks, sources, and generating AI content. Supports both personal NotebookLM and enterprise Google Workspace accounts.

**Prerequisites:**
1. Install the package: `uv tool install notebooklm-enterprise-mcp`
2. Authenticate: Run `nlm login` to set up your Google account

**Features:**
- Create and manage notebooks
- Add sources (URLs, YouTube, Google Drive, text, files)
- Generate podcasts (Audio Overview)
- Create quizzes, flashcards, mind maps, reports
- Research topics with web or Drive search
- Enterprise Google Workspace support

tools.name: studio_create
tools.description: Generate audio, video, reports, quizzes, etc.

tools.name: research_start
tools.description: Research topics via web or Drive
